description: Add a text annotation anchored to a shape (point, line, circle, etc.) on a 2D graph, with optional offset for precise placement. Use only when the user explicitly requests labels.
utility: Add text label anchored to a shape on a 2D graph

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Shape reference (point, line, circle, etc.) using at(shape_var) or direct shape variable

arguments.name: text
arguments.description: Label text in quotes. ASCII math auto-converts to LaTeX.

arguments.name: buff
arguments.description: Offset from anchor position in logical units. Positive col = right, positive row = down.

alternates.description: Label near a named point using at() positioning
Label at point variable without at() wrapper
Label anchored to a line or other shape

examples.scenario: Label center of a circle with coordinates (equation of a circle lesson)
Label diameter endpoint with coordinates (circle from a diameter lesson)
Label axis intercept point with letter (axis intercepts lesson)
Label a line equation with rotation (axis intercepts lesson)
Label on a plotting graph at a plot point (table plot lesson)
